snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public and documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code, and shared executable schemas. Focused automated gates execute current implementation and test evidence on every run.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review covered all five dimensions on the exact existing-resource-only candidate. It required unambiguous sensitive handling, removal of a stale prompt-first recommendation, exact Profile/endpoint authority, and restoration of a decision anchor; after repair it accepted ordinary_allowed for known destinations, higher-risk gates, stricter modes, truthful partial/open status, and no Pige telemetry/proxy or inherited authority.

Fresh read-only reviewer audited the exact 54-file Provider/Home candidate after four privacy repairs. It traced OpenAI key-only setup, global default, agent.ask/local fallback, query-hash Jobs, per-turn evidence audits, drift/confinement, UI/prototypes, exact evidence, unchanged statuses, residual gaps, 1,079 claims, screenshots, and budgets; all five dimensions passed with zero blockers and no edits.

Fresh read-only reviewer audited the exact direct-image candidate without editing files, rejected an engine-ownership phrase and an overbroad E2.06 projection, then accepted the repaired wording. It traced preservation into Pi-selected OCR, no-child/waiting-child recovery, completed-empty parking across restart, deterministic reuse, cancellation, reference-original and legacy compatibility, Owner/acceptance mappings, unchanged statuses, residual gaps, semantic lock, and budgets; all five dimensions have zero blockers.

Read-only architecture reviewer rejected the first L2 delta for missing capture/Agent evidence and imprecise guard recovery wording, then independently verified the exact repair, Owner/acceptance consistency, capture and index_rebuild limits, semantic lock, budgets, and zero-blocker score without editing files.

At the pre-implementation checkpoint, this read-only reviewer challenged semantic-lock drift, document-budget overflow, no-model onboarding, legacy runtime wording, tool contracts, and fixed host sequencing; after repair it accepted that earlier approved-but-unimplemented exception without editing files.

Independent read-only final reviewer traced the current diff across product, architecture, Pi, parser, jobs, prompt, context, onboarding, API/data, milestones, decisions, playbook, quality, and acceptance. It found and required repair of nested-model retrieval, final-text write, capture-only, URL, selection-action, legacy-decision, and size conflicts, then reported no remaining status promotion or implementation overclaim.

Read-only risk reviewer checked the L2 action-safety state paths, exact evidence selectors and projections, semantic-lock delta, unchanged partial states, and residual cross-process/platform gaps without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer challenged an initial status interpretation and missing open facts, then accepted the exact minimal repair: fake/local-only Owner wording, one E5.02 evidence projection, unchanged planned/partial/in-progress states, complete production gaps, and current semantic lock without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer rejected the mutable action pin and non-minimal registry edits, then accepted the repaired full-SHA CI report boundary, exact Quality/TECH/dependency/acceptance projection, unchanged partial/in-progress states, complete retrieval gaps, 1,058-claim semantic delta, and budgets without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer rejected an Owner rewrite that weakened prior link/security facts and acceptance gaps owned by UI or Knowledge Health, then accepted the exact repair: preserved Phase 4 rules, isolated B6.12 aggregate facts, one selector, unchanged states, correct destinations, semantic delta, and budgets without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer rejected an inaccurate maintenance/drainer claim, ambiguous RSS limit, incorrect action-safety propagation, weak smoke-only cancellation evidence, and stale Playbook wording; it then accepted the exact repaired worker/cancellation/recovery candidate with unchanged states and complete residual gaps without editing files.

Read-only reviewer rejected Pi completion without a real upstream loop, unsafe diagnostic details and top-level messages, overbroad backup evidence, and a conflicting AI SDK runtime path; after repair it accepted the exact 104-file candidate, 1,063-claim lock, unchanged states, and explicit residual gaps without editing files.

Fresh read-only dependency reviewer found the original workspace-lock verifier false negative and Decision lifecycle risk, then independently accepted the repaired 106-file Undici 8.7 candidate, exact owner alignment, unchanged semantic lock and statuses, and explicit platform/HTTP2 residuals without editing files.

dimensions.summary: Existing Home, Models, Permissions, onboarding, public privacy, and routing resources now explain one-time exact-destination disclosure, quiet daily status, optional stricter controls, and capture-only fallback without a new page or wizard.

Vision, PRD, runtime policy, Provider Profiles, Settings, Security, Privacy, onboarding, UI, Decision, Playbook, and permission guidance agree on ordinary_allowed plus sensitive/restricted/unknown/changed and stricter-policy gates.

The 1,079-claim lock binds the changed PRD, PIGE-SEC-005, B3.05, E3.03, P0 model, and open acceptance facts. PIGE-SEC-005/E3.03 remain partial with implementation migration and confirmation resume open.

Owners tell Development to change the default without changing the schema/algorithm, preserve typed audits and higher-risk gates, add persisted stricter settings later, and avoid coupling this follow-up to broader Provider or Agent work.

Existing owners were replaced/deduplicated rather than expanded: 57 Markdown files, 23,222 lines, 162,320 words, 1,209,014 bytes, 4,014 entry words, 5,409 trace lines, zero duplicate groups, and 14 mutations.

verification.evidence: Full verification passed: docs, 81 decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, 49 dependencies, fixtures, Pi/import boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005, and all five quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run smoke:pi-agent-runtime && npm run smoke:index-rebuild-worker && npm run smoke:parser-workers && npm run smoke:macos-vision-ocr
verification.evidence: No implementation file changed in this governance-only candidate; origin/main retains the shipped 67-file/495-test, typecheck, production-build, Pi/Home, worker, and macOS Vision evidence.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 passed: 4,014/4,200 entry words, zero duplicate groups, 14 mutations, 5,409 trace lines, 57 Markdown files, 1,209,044 bytes, and 7.40 percent line reduction.
The governed snapshot is d1c13a46bbd95171b09bbdbf36a5487b8c6adab4420eb2e3f6d29167526d0969 across 109 files; current and locked ledgers contain 1,079 claims with zero differences.

coordination.compatibility: No stable ID or status changed. The contract default becomes ordinary_allowed, while the current confirm_private_or_large code default, persisted stricter settings, confirmation resume, provider breadth, and platform proof stay open.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning applied the user-approved local-first/BYOK principle to existing Owners, UI copy, Decision, Playbook, Spec, acceptance, semantic lock, and recipe; Development and Project Management received the exact non-blocking implementation route, and UI Design accepted the corrected interaction contract.

resolvedBlockers: Defined local-first without BYOK friction: one exact-destination disclosure, ordinary_allowed routine use with quiet status, sensitive confirmation, restricted blocking, unknown/changed reconfirmation, optional stricter modes, and no inherited authority; kept the old executable default explicitly open.

Rewrote README as a concise product entry with user value, honest current capability, the Agent-first roadmap, privacy boundaries, and the Agent-authored automation goal instead of a technical inventory.

Made Product Planning the sole product, technical, development-management, and governance contract editor; kept detailed UI guidance with UI Design, code/evidence with Development, and delivery/Git/CI/releases with Project Management; cross-role edits require explicit scoped delegation.

Added Agent role, cross-role delegation, and Product Planning design-sync status to context, handoff, and PR intake; routed public design contributions to Planning or UI Design and added missing-field and missing-routing mutations.
Kept the PRD as the AI Coding Agent product contract and made PRD/Owner impact bidirectional without duplicating full definitions across documents.
Removed repeated parse/OCR and UI checklist prose in favor of exact Owner pointers; retained zero duplicate groups and reduced governed Markdown lines by 8.67 percent from baseline.

Adopted exact Pi v0.80.6 core/AI under the approved containment exception with bundled license text, isolated models/auth, one importer, inert compat defaults, import-side-effect and mutation gates, and no second AI SDK.

Synchronized single-writer pre-publication guard persistence, capture projection fencing, process-local Agent-ingest cancellation, monotonic restart recovery, and exact evidence without promoting partial states.

Synchronized the B6.15 CI-produced body-free retrieval report, one exact upload selector, immutable upload-action pin, honest partial states, and complete model/linking/vector/locale/scale/platform gaps without changing runtime behavior.

Synchronized the B6.12 rebuildable Knowledge Tree aggregate foundation, one exact selector, honest partial/planned states, preserved Phase 4 link boundaries, and correct UI/Health ownership without exposing a public tree contract.

Synchronized the explicit P4 index-rebuild worker, process-local progress/cancellation, bounded resource protocol, rollback semantics, one exact selector, unchanged verified/partial states, and complete scale/cross-process/recovery/platform gaps.

Made Pi Agent the sole post-preservation semantic orchestrator, defined schema-complete single-effect Pige tools and Host gates, removed the mistaken AI SDK path, and kept the direct bridge and fixed parser/OCR continuations explicitly transitional without promotion.

Reconciled capture-only, URL extraction, parser/OCR, retrieval, selection, publication, prompt/context, Jobs, API/data, milestones, and legacy decisions with the Agent-led contract; implemented text and supported-PDF parse/OCR verticals while keeping B3.13/E3.08 partial.

Bound fail-closed diagnostic detail and top-level-message persistence/export, retention, rotation, and 11-case no-telemetry evidence; scoped backup evidence to current registered in-vault roots while preserving every broader gap.

Repaired CON-002 so it isolates JobRecordSchema, checks root strictness and cross-field cancellation invariants, and rejects three in-memory false-positive mutations instead of matching a later unrelated schema.

Upgraded the direct desktop runtime to Undici 8.7.0 while preserving manual per-hop validation, fresh address-pinned Agents and explicit HTTP/1.1; added workspace-aware lock verification and four multi-version cases without changing acceptance or product status.
Persisted and linked deterministic capture/parse/OCR children before parent terminalization, with crash recovery reusing one child instead of losing or duplicating semantic continuation.
Separated non-secret runtime readiness from credential-bearing runtime resolution; status, onboarding, and scheduling now prove zero decryption before model-egress allow.

Added an Agent-selected PDF parse tool whose deterministic child identity binds the semantic action while raw Pi call IDs remain non-durable and only capped parent-scoped hashes are retained as provenance.
Added Agent-selected PDF OCR over parser-verified pages with one deterministic child, retry/wait reuse, cancellation propagation, empty-output stop, and re-inspection before cited publication.

Moved DOCX/PPTX parse and parser-selected PPTX media OCR onto Pi tool events with deterministic children, idempotent retry, cancellation, no-readable-evidence stop, and capability recovery both before and after an OCR child exists.

Moved direct-image OCR onto Pi tool events with no pre-tool child, deterministic reuse, capability recovery, cancellation, empty-output parking across restart, wrong-tool rejection, and managed/reference source proof.

Added the reviewed OpenAI key-only preset and global default plus a Pi-grounded Home query vertical with no-model local fallback, body-free per-turn audits, exact Markdown/source privacy drift checks, confined records, untrusted evidence, fixed zero-evidence output, typed UI states, and no raw key/path/body/error exposure.
nonBlockingRisks: P5 remains in progress: remaining Job-class publishers, running capture/other-class cancellation, strict cross-process Job CAS and routing, parent-directory swap, guard-to-domain atomicity, guard-without-output recovery, checkpoint arrays, cross-file transactions, Windows/Paddle, packaged-filesystem proof, and visible progress/cancel UI remain open.

Explicit index rebuild is process-local only: implicit first-query rebuild, formal 10k CPU/RSS/latency, incremental/staging-swap, cross-process writer/CAS/routing, complete kill/crash/stale-worker recovery, packaged macOS/Windows paths, and visible progress/cancel UI remain open.

The local-tool lifecycle remains a fake/local service foundation: real Paddle/Python/model/language-pack transport, ordinary-ingest no-hidden-install proof, production app-data/catalog/permission/pre-vault Job/Operation wiring, OCR/UI, supply chain, packaged platforms, cross-process locking, complete recovery/GC/quarantine purge, and background lifecycle controls remain open.

The retrieval regression foundation remains lexical and synthetic: model-grounded summary/citation validation under cloud-send and Permission enforcement, tag/topic/entity and Knowledge Tree thresholds, vector/reranker ranking, 10k/100k and UI/packaged proof, and broader locale/query families remain open.

The Knowledge Tree remains internal-only: broader relation and branch semantics, richer aggregate inputs, public IPC/preload/renderer navigation, localized empty state, 10k worker/incremental rebuild proof, packaged parity, and the separately owned visual/accessibility and Knowledge Health work remain open.

Pi remains partial: ingest retrieval/proposals, complete provider catalog/custom protocols, remaining fixed routes, generic continuation, persisted Broker, Home drainer/retry/cancel/conversations, combined read-to-retrieve-to-publish, manual packaged BYOK, signed platforms, and broader cross-process/cross-file recovery remain open.

No-telemetry is a static executable gate; unknown SDKs, computed endpoints, indirect transports, generated configuration, and crash-hook review remain open. Diagnostics still need broader stores, recovery correlation, user clear, export cancellation, selected-path UX, and crash recovery.

Backup still needs backupId/domainSchemaVersions, release exclusion scans, external managed copies, include controls, durable Jobs/checkpoints, structured dependencies, and complete restore orchestration.
Trace projections use 5,409 of 5,500 lines and governed Markdown uses 1,209,473 of 1,210,000 bytes; future semantic additions must reclaim capacity in the same change instead of raising budgets.
PRD, TECH_ARCHITECTURE, and Decision Log remain large Owner documents; future Agents should continue section-targeted reads and define each fact once.
The concise pre-alpha README intentionally has no install button, screenshots, or release download; add those only when a usable signed build and governed visual evidence exist.
Structural UI gates do not prove packaged macOS/Windows fidelity, accessibility, or human visual approval; real capture and release evidence remain open.

External-reference pins are review-time facts. Any experiment must repeat license, provenance, supply-chain, privacy, isolation, platform, and replacement checks; no reviewed project is authorized for code or asset copying by its reference row.

Undici 8.7 still needs signed/packaged macOS and Windows runtime proof. The local TLS smoke proves the assembled Electron-main ABI and transport constraints, not the complete production SourceFetchService path, system proxy matrix, or packaged parity; HTTP/2 remains disabled until separately pinned and tested.
